sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29854" key="e" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ε</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἒ ψιλόν</orth>, fifth letter of the Gr. alphabet: as numeral <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έ</itype> <sense id="n29854.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πέντε</ref> </xr> and <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πέμπτος</foreign>, but <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign"><num TEIform="num">ε᾽</num> </foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">000</biblScope> </bibl>:—its name was <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἶ</foreign>, q.v., later <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἒ ψιλόν</foreign>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ψιλός</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
